speaker: speaker1
text: Doris , I'm glad you're home . I'm terrified . I don't know what to do !

speaker: speaker1
text: I think someone is stalking me .

speaker: speaker2
text: No , it can't be . Really ? Who ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't know . I saw him the first time Tuesday . He was at the cafe . I noticed he was looking at me a lot . Not just the usual looking , but staring.He just kept staring at me . He didn't stop .

speaker: speaker1
text: I didn't do anything . Finally , he left.But then I saw him again today . Outside the shoe store . Near the cafe . I went into a CD store and pretended I was looking at CD's . But then he came in too .

speaker: speaker2
text: Did he leave when you left ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . Then I noticed he was on the sidewalk behind me . He was following me .
